live-pill: position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; height: 22px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--live); color: #fff; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.4px;
live-dot: width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; animation: pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite;
ch-avatar: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6B4AAE, #2C1666); display: block;
follow-btn: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 14px; border-radius: 6px; background: var(--purple); color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; border: none; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(145,70,255,0.35);
chat-head: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.6px; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 10px 12px 6px;
emote: display: inline-block; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 3px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9146FF, #772CE8); vertical-align: -4px; margin: 0 1px;
chat-input: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin: 8px 12px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 14px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; gap: 3px; letter-spacing: 0.2px; position: relative;
